content: Only one file can be uploaded at a time.

comment.text: Tooltip content. Appears when hovering over the help icon next to the file upload input, explaining that only one file can be uploaded at a time.

usage.context:
place="right"
 tooltipContent={
 <Text fontSize="12px">
 {isFolderMode
 ? t("SingleFolderDescription")
 : t("SingleFileDescription")}
 </Text>
 }
 dataTestId="single_help_button"
 />
 </LabelGroup>
